SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-04-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-15-1999 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEF'S CORRESPONDENCE RCVD. (TO BE FILED WHEN FOLDER IS AVAILABLE; HRG.WAS 11-15-99;

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KWAN, KIN MO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAW OFFICE OF KIRBY & KIRBY LO,TO MING $1,531.41 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,551.41, LAW OFFICES OF KIRBY & KIRBY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
